params.name: titleText
params.description: Plain text heading content for the summary. Ignored if `titleHtml` is provided.

params.name: titleHtml
params.description: Trusted HTML heading content for the summary. When provided it replaces `titleText`.

params.name: descriptionText
params.description: Optional plain text description shown below the heading. Ignored if `descriptionHtml` is provided.

params.name: descriptionHtml
params.description: Optional trusted HTML description content. When provided it replaces `descriptionText`.

params.name: errorList
params.description: Contains an array of error link items and all their available arguments.

params.name: href
params.description: Href attribute for the error link item. If provided item will be an anchor.

params.name: text
params.description: If `html` is set, this is not required. Text for the error link item. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: html
params.description: If `text` is set, this is not required. HTML for the error link item. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the error link anchor.

params.name: classes
params.description: Extra classes added to the root element for layout or integration hooks.

params.name: idPrefix
params.description: Optional prefix used to generate the heading id referenced by `aria-labelledby`. Use this when rendering more than one summary on the same page.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes to add to the root element, for example `data-*` or `aria-*` attributes.
